series_metadata.series_description: Hearing ifficer reports and recommendations, notices, orders, and transcripts. The hearing officer conducts administrative hearings including agent license revocations, Ohio Fair Plan and rule hearings. Includes miscellaneous documents related to the hearing.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 10 years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 10 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
